mapper.sql: id, name, code, status, remark, tenant_id, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_role WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.code, SPLIT_PART(p.code, ':', 1) AS resource, SPLIT_PART(p.code, ':', 2) AS action FROM sys_permission p WHERE p.deleted = FALSE AND p.id IN ( SELECT rp.permission_id FROM sys_role_permission rp WHERE rp.role_id = #{roleId} AND rp.deleted = FALSE ) ORDER BY p.code
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_role SET name = #{name}, code = #{code}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE AND version = #{version}
UPDATE sys_role SET deleted = TRUE WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_role_permission SET deleted = TRUE WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_role_permission (id, role_id, permission_id, tenant_id, created_by, updated_by, version) VALUES (#{id}, #{roleId}, #{permissionId}, #{tenantId}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, 1)
